page_title: 80% Cotton 20% Polyester Twill Fabric, 130 gr/m'2 - ArWoWear T0 Soft - Ariteks
description_blocks: ArWoWear T0 Soft is light weight 130 g/m², 80% cotton 20% polyester medical twill fabric. It is the most used fabric for medical wear with high cotton confort and polyester durability.

technical_documents.label: >> ArWoWear T0 Soft Data Sheet

text_blocks.text: Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics. Medical Technical Textiles
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.

ArWoWear T0 Soft is light weight 130 g/m², 80% cotton 20% polyester medical twill fabric. It is the most used fabric for medical wear with high cotton confort and polyester durability.
